creator: freebsd-ports@jan0sch.de
text:
Created attachment 216222
Patch to update devel/mill to version 0.7.4.

Hi,

an update for devel/mill to version 0.7.4.

Changelog
---------

- Format thread id for thread counts greater 9
- Properly generate code for system properties.
- Fix BSP compile and clean
- No need for -i for BSP
- Dottydoc fix
- Fixed destination path for foreign-module setup
- BSP: Deduplicate targets to compile
- Replace scala-library artifact with dotty-library
- Adding url to generated developer setting in published pom.
- Made user agent mill specific to better identify mill
- Fix Scala.js 1.x where x != 0 
- Wrap class names in single quotes in launcher script
- ZincProblemPosition: fix infinite loops
- Added --repl and --no-server and changed behavior of -i/--interactive
- BSP: Mill build Scala lib dep and Forward env vars to server start
- Allows the ScalafmtModule to format build sources
- Generate sourcemaps on scalajs 1.

Kind regards,

Jens
